fragments.name: source-family
fragments.description: Reason-code family for source validation failures and source-plane deny conditions.

fragments.name: export-family
fragments.description: Reason-code family for contract export failures and derived-schema deny conditions.

fragments.name: normalization-family
fragments.description: Reason-code family for nondeterminism and normalization boundary failures.

fragments.name: admission-family
fragments.description: Reason-code family for legality and admission deny conditions.

fragments.name: render-family
fragments.description: Reason-code family for render/runtime failures and non-admitted-input violations.

fragments.name: drift-family
fragments.description: Reason-code family for drift, missing-output, and hand-edited-derived deny conditions.

notes: Authoritative source module for the reason-code surface slice. It materializes the named gate reason-code families as first-class registry input.
